show_badge.label: Show blind box badge
show_badge.info: Use this block on blind-box product templates only. The badge is storefront messaging only and does not run assignment logic.

show_icon.label: Show icon next to badge
show_icon.info: Decorative icon for the blind-box badge row.

badge_text.label: Badge label
badge_text.info: Short badge text for blind-box product pages.

title.label: Headline
title.info: Main heading for the blind-box explanation card.

description.label: Supporting description
description.info: Use this to explain the blind-box format clearly. Keep it focused on product expectations, not reveal or checkout behavior.

display_variant.label: Display layout
display_variant.info: Choose the overall layout style for the product page. Standard fits most blind-box templates.

detail_level.label: Information density
detail_level.info: Compact keeps the message shorter. Expanded shows the full supporting explainer.

show_how_it_works.label: Show purchase-flow explainer
show_how_it_works.info: Displays the explanatory card that tells shoppers the final item is assigned after purchase.

show_rarity_note.label: Show collectible note
show_rarity_note.info: Turn off if you do not want to mention rarity or assortment on this product template.

rarity_note.label: Collectible note
rarity_note.info: Optional note for rarity, assortment, or collectible framing.

show_disclaimer.label: Show store disclaimer
show_disclaimer.info: Turn off if the template should stay lighter and the store note is not needed.

disclaimer.label: Store disclaimer
disclaimer.info: Optional presentation disclaimer for storefront expectation setting. Keep it clear and shopper-facing.
